title: gladiolus mutabilis
intro: Gladiolus mutabilis, also known as the butterfly bush or sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Iridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Gladiolus mutabilis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antimicrobial agent. Gladiolus mutabilis can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
